channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Iran Live Updates: Iran Strikes Bahrain and Kuwait After Trump's Retribution Attacks
item.description: President Donald Trump announced major combat operations against Iran on Feb. 28, with massive joint U.S.-Israeli strikes.

item.title: Graham Platner halts Senate campaign following sexual assault accusation
item.description: The Democratic candidate was seeking a Senate seat in Maine.

item.title: Trump's proposed triumphal arch in Washington faces renewed federal review
item.description: President Donald Trump's plan for a triumphal arch that would change the D.C. skyline is undergoing another review by the federal agency.

item.title: Bonnie Tyler, singer of "Total Eclipse of the Heart," dies at 75
item.description: Bonnie Tyler, the Welsh pop star known for her 1983 hit "Total Eclipse of the Heart," has passed away at age 75.
